<message> I am willing to pay 48.5 ZUP for X. </message></s>[SYSTEM_PROMPT]Remember you can only trade in integer amounts, not decimals.[/SYSTEM_PROMPT][INST]<other player message> I can meet you at 48 ZUP. </other player message>
